purpose: Short operational description for the FahMai RAG/Text-to-SQL agent.

production_interfaces.source_of_truth_boundary: fah_sai_lpk_core is for backend execution, validation, and citation; do not expose it in the main LLM schema prompt.

routing_guide.sales_order_360: Order counts, branch/channel/customer/payment status, order-level net totals.
routing_guide.sales_line_360: SKU/product/category/vendor units and line_total_thb revenue. Do not sum repeated order_net_total_thb.
routing_guide.finance_event: Refund payouts, bank transactions, payroll, vendor payments.
routing_guide.customer_ops_event: Returns, warranty claims, CS interactions, shipping, loyalty, promo redemptions.
routing_guide.inventory_event: Inventory movements and monthly inventory risk.
routing_guide.product_catalog: Product attributes, vendor, recall, care-plus tier context.
routing_guide.policy_catalog: Policy versions, signing authority, promo mechanics, vendor contract versions.
routing_guide.document_evidence: Public-safe document/OCR evidence, parent-child RAG metadata, citations.

aggregation_rules: Use sales_order_360 for order-level totals and order counts.
Do not sum sales_line_360.order_net_total_thb because it repeats order-level values across line rows.
Use business_event_date as the default fact period axis unless the question explicitly asks for posting or accounting timing.
Convert BE years before filtering, for example BE 2568 is 2025-01-01 inclusive to 2026-01-01 exclusive.
citation_rules: Prefer source_table and source_pk from model-facing rows or retrieved evidence.
Cite official source rows/tables, not helper views or internal provenance tables.
Use document_evidence and BGE retrieval for policy, report, and OCR support.
Treat audit/provenance-only artifacts as internal trace data, not final-answer evidence.
prompt_hygiene_rules: The main LLM prompt must not list fah_sai_lpk_core, fah_sai_lpk_rag, fah_sai_lpk_mart, fah_sai_lpk_eval, raw schemas, or all 31 official CSV tables.
The 31-table core M-Schema may be loaded only for internal schema inspection, migration validation, or trusted DB tooling.
If the production prompt has more than 8 # Table headers, it is the wrong prompt.
remote_artifact_query: SELECT content FROM fah_sai_lpk_meta.mschema_artifacts WHERE artifact_name = 'fahmai_rag_agent_description' AND schema_mode = 'rag_agent' AND artifact_format = 'text';
